_readme: 本文件为 scenarios[] 人工基线示例。compare_perf_snapshots.py 仅接受 perf_profile_tracemalloc.py --json-out 生成的扁平 JSON 根对象，勿将本文件误作其输入。

scenarios.notes: Fill after local run; compare across commits

serialize_exec_payload_sample in tests/test_perf_synthetic.py; run-to-run ratio assert in same test
